Space Max and Addition of Unlike Fractions
Mission: Landed
Fuel: 0/10
Controls ▾
Move Space Max: WASD, keyboard arrows, or the left on-screen pad. Look around with mouse drag or the right-side buttons. Walk to Addy and the chamber. The door opens upwards when you approach. Space Max has strong collision: Addy, her spaceship, the volcano, rocket, computer, chamber walls, and closed doors are solid.

E Interact
🚀 Space Chamber Mission

Space Max and Addition of Unlike Fractions

Help Space Max fuel Addy’s spaceship by solving addition of unlike fractions.

Space Max lands on Addy’s volcanic planet just as a gigantic eruption begins.

Addy needs help to fuel her spaceship. Max explains: find a common denominator, rename both fractions, add the numerators, then simplify.

Complete the challenge to earn the Energy Crystal and escape safely.

How to play

Move: Use WASD / arrow keys on laptop, or the on-screen arrow pads on mobile.

Mission rule: Learn Mode and Practice Mode are for preparation. Finish 10 Challenge Mode questions correctly in one sitting to fuel Addy’s spaceship and collect the Energy Crystal.

Fraction hint: Change both fractions to the same denominator first. Then add the numerators, keep the denominator, and simplify.

Helpful step

Mission Complete!

Space Max completed 10 Challenge Mode questions in one sitting, received the Energy Crystal from Addy, boarded Addy’s spaceship, and flew to safety.
